title: Macelib
description: Library for extra maces and mace enchantments
body:
# Macelib
Macelib is a library mod that allows developers to add custom enchantments for the mace added in 1.21. And even add extra maces on top! **When used on it's own, this mod adds no content other than allowing the mace to be enchanted with durabilty and weapon enchantments**.

![image](https://github.com/ConsularAtol/macelib/assets/83845237/5548e466-ac0b-43e7-ad19-83aaabad804e)

For more information on using Macelib for development, please visit the [wiki](https://github.com/ConsularAtol/macelib/wiki).
